title: Paths Tutorial
description: A cursed fortress rises from the mist. Brave souls are needed to uncover its dark secrets before the ancient evil consumes the realm. Every corridor hides a choice, every choice shapes your fate.
author: Paths Games Team

card.title: Paths Tutorial
card.description: Enter the cursed fortress if you dare.

card.title: Elf
card.description: Steadfast and strong. He has seen war and chosen peace.

title: Whispers Forest
description: The ancient wood holds secrets that even the gods have forgotten. Your journey through its twisted paths will test every virtue and challenge every belief you hold dear.
author: Paths Games Team

card.title: Whispers Forest
card.description: The forest knows your deepest fears.

title: Kings Desert
description: Beneath the endless sands lie buried kingdoms and forgotten treasures. The scorching sun hides what the wind can never reveal. Are you worthy of the ancient crown?
author: Paths Games Team

title: Red Throne
description: A kingdom torn by civil war needs a champion. Will you forge alliances and restore peace, or seize power for yourself? Every decision ripples through the realm.
author: Paths Games Team

title: Seas of Fire
description: Sail across cursed waters where sea monsters reign and pirate lords battle for supremacy. Only the bravest dare to chart these waters. Your ship, your legend.
author: Paths Games Team
